ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organisations" (
  "organisation_uri" TEXT /* Unique URI for the organisation */,
  "organisation_label" TEXT /* Label or name of the organisation */,
  "organisation_type" TEXT /* Type of organisation (e.g. local authority, private developer) */,
  "organisation_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the organisation */,
  "organisation_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "organisation_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organisation_uri")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_reference" TEXT /* Unique reference for the site */,
  "organisation_uri" TEXT /* Reference to the organisation managing the site */,
  "site_name_address" TEXT /* Address of the site */,
  "site_plan_url" TEXT /* URL to the site plan */,
  "coordinate_reference_system" TEXT /* Coordinate reference system used for the site */,
  "geo_x" REAL /* X coordinate of the site in the chosen CRS */,
  "geo_y" REAL /* Y coordinate of the site in the chosen CRS */,
  "hectares" REAL /* Size of the site in hectares */,
  "ownership_status" TEXT /* Ownership status of the site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the site */,
  "site_category" TEXT /* Category of the site (e.g. residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_reference"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_organisation_uri FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_uri") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_uri")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "site_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the site */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission granted */,
  "permission_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was granted */,
  "planning_status" TEXT /* Current status of the planning application */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission granted */,
  "permission_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions attached to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_reference")
)

CREATE TABLE "developments" (
  "site_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the site */,
  "min_net_dwellings" INTEGER /* Minimum number of net dwellings proposed */,
  "development_description" TEXT /* Description of the development planned */,
  "non_housing_development" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the development is non-housing */,
  "development_status" TEXT /* Current status of the development (e.g. proposed, in progress, completed) */,
  "development_start_date" TEXT /* Date the development started */,
  "development_end_date" TEXT /* Date the development is expected to end */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_reference")
)

CREATE TABLE "planning_history" (
  "site_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the site */,
  "first_added_date" TEXT /* Date the planning information was first added */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the planning information was last updated */,
  "planning_history" TEXT /* Notes on planning history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_reference")
)

CREATE TABLE "stakeholders" (
  "stakeholder_uri" TEXT /* Unique URI for the stakeholder */,
  "stakeholder_name" TEXT /* Name of the stakeholder */,
  "stakeholder_type" TEXT /* Type of stakeholder (e.g. resident, business, community group) */,
  "stakeholder_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the stakeholder */,
  "stakeholder_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "stakeholder_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stakeholder_uri")
)

CREATE TABLE "consultations" (
  "consultation_uri" TEXT /* Unique URI for the consultation */,
  "consultation_type" TEXT /* Type of consultation (e.g. public consultation, stakeholder engagement) */,
  "consultation_start_date" TEXT /* Date the consultation started */,
  "consultation_end_date" TEXT /* Date the consultation ended */,
  "consultation_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the consultation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consultation_uri")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_stakeholders" (
  "site_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the site */,
  "stakeholder_uri" TEXT /* Reference to the stakeholder */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between the site and stakeholder (e.g. objector, supporter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_reference", "stakeholder_uri")
)
